---
title: "annex.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\annex.py"
loc: 148
complexity: 29
logic_score: 3.98
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 4.64
overall_score: 1.88
---

## Intent
The `annex.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on HeimdallWarden, __init__, scan, _should_ignore, _audit_code, _generate_plan, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via HeimdallWarden, __init__, scan, _should_ignore, _audit_code, _generate_plan, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [re](file://re)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `HeimdallWarden`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `_should_ignore`
- `_audit_code`
- `_generate_plan`
- `main`
